name.text: Final Q1: Primary mission of a SOC

questiontext.text: What is the primary mission of a Security Operations Center (SOC)?

answer.text: To develop new software products for the organization
To monitor, detect, analyze, and respond to cybersecurity incidents
To manage the organization's IT helpdesk operations
To audit financial transactions for compliance

name.text: Final Q2: SOC analyst tier for initial triage

questiontext.text: In the SOC tiered analyst model, which tier is responsible for initial alert triage and noise reduction?

answer.text: Tier 3 (L3)
SOC Manager
Tier 1 (L1)
Tier 2 (L2)
Security Incident and Emergency Management
System Integration and Event Monitoring
Security Information and Event Management
Structured Intelligence and Event Mapping

name.text: Final Q4: KPI for time to detect

questiontext.text: Which KPI measures the average time from when an incident occurs to when it is first detected?

answer.text: MTTR (Mean Time to Respond)
MTTD (Mean Time to Detect)
MTTI (Mean Time to Investigate)
False Positive Rate

questiontext.text: What is "alert fatigue" in a SOC context?

answer.text: The physical tiredness SOC analysts experience from staring at screens
When analysts become desensitized to alerts due to excessive volume, potentially missing real threats
A technical failure where the SIEM stops generating alerts
A performance metric used to evaluate analyst response time

name.text: Final Q6: Target 2013 breach contributing factor

questiontext.text: In the 2013 Target data breach, what was a key contributing factor to the breach's success?

answer.text: Target had no antivirus software installed
Attackers broke into Target's physical data center
SOC analysts received alerts but failed to act on them in time
Target's firewall was misconfigured and allowed all traffic

name.text: Final Q7: MITRE ATT&CK framework purpose

questiontext.text: The MITRE ATT&CK framework is primarily used by SOC analysts to:

answer.text: Track employee working hours and productivity
Map detected adversary behavior to known attack techniques and improve detection
Automate firewall rule deployment
Calculate the financial cost of a security incident
